description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build that takes a postfix string input. The workflow runs on ubuntu-22.04 for Linux and windows-latest for Windows, building and testing a project with RabbitMQ service for Linux. It configures CMake, builds, tests, and uploads a Linux library artifact. For Windows, it downloads the Linux library, builds with MSBuild, renames the build, and releases a zipped artifact to GitHub with a changelog and build log.
